chief_complaint: Three patients, 2 males and 1 female, aged 45, 52, and 58, respectively, presented with focal neurological symptoms after receiving holocranial radiotherapy.
history: The patients developed focal neurological symptoms after a variable latency period following holocranial radiotherapy for brain tumours. Other possible aetiologies were ruled out.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings were not provided.
labs: Demographic, clinical, analytical and neuroimaging variables were collected, but specific results were not provided.
